notes: Three search piles at the cemetery: the lectern at the central mausoleum (the list, the missal, the brass inscription kit), a candle stub on the W row, the central lamp at the spine (the bell-rope kit).

vault_row_w.label: A Vault on the W Row

beatrices_clipped_list.label: Beatrice's clipped list
beatrices_clipped_list.flavor: Two pages. Page one is the names already announced by the rectory. Page two is the names Beatrice has been adding by hand for two weeks.

your_missal_with_the_back_page.label: Your missal (back page list)
your_missal_with_the_back_page.flavor: The blue cloth one. The names you have been carrying since 2003. Your grandmother is fourth from the top.

the_inscription_brass.label: The brass inscription kit
the_inscription_brass.flavor: Mr Decoteau's. Letter punches and a soft hammer. He has been re-strengthening the names on the older brass plates as he walks the rows.

a_candle_stub_from_1996.label: A candle stub from 1996
a_candle_stub_from_1996.flavor: At the seventh vault. Set there twenty-nine All Souls' Eves ago. Mireille Lavigne's grandmother set it. Nobody, in the intervening years, has thought to throw it away.

a_broken_brass_letter.label: A broken brass letter (M)
a_broken_brass_letter.flavor: Off one of the vault plates. The M of MARIE. Mr Decoteau will, this week, punch a new one. Tonight the letter is in your pocket because you found it on the brick and didn't want it to be walked on.

effects.text: The M in your pocket. You will give it to Decoteau at the central lamp.

the_moss_patch.label: Moss off the W row vaults
the_moss_patch.flavor: Soft. Damp. The cemetery is moss-friendly. You set it back at the foot of the vault.

lamp_oil_can.label: Lamp oil (can)
lamp_oil_can.flavor: At the foot of the central lamp. Mr Decoteau tops the wicks every All Souls'.

a_replacement_wick.label: A replacement wick
a_replacement_wick.flavor: Cotton braid. In a small tin next to the oil can. The third lamp's wick has been long for a year and Decoteau has not, yet, swapped it.

the_box_of_matches.label: The box of matches
the_box_of_matches.flavor: Strike-anywhere. The box's striker is, by November, soft from damp. The matches still work.
